ageGate.title: Are you 18 or older?
ageGate.subtitle: The Playroom is an adults-only platform.

hero.headline: Your space. Your rules. Your community.
hero.subheadline: Private matchmaking for singles and couples in the lifestyle scene. Verified, encrypted, no judgement.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your account type and personalize your profile with photos and bio.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Discover your archetype and preferences with our Yes/No/Maybe quiz.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Free users get random matches. VIP uses AI for real compatibility.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Book events at verified swing clubs. Exact location shown after booking is accepted.

accountTypes.title: Who is The Playroom for?
accountTypes.femaleSingleDesc: Explore the lifestyle at your own pace, with total control and privacy.
accountTypes.maleSingleDesc: Connect with singles and couples who share your interests.
accountTypes.coupleDesc: Explore together with individual profiles and shared matches.
accountTypes.swingClubDesc: Manage events, bookings and your community on a dedicated platform.
accountTypes.sexShopDesc: Sell your products to a verified and discreet adult community.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security first
privacy.e2eDesc: Real end-to-end encryption. The server never reads your messages.
privacy.verifiedDesc: Photo, video and social media checks. You always know who you are talking to.
privacy.locationDesc: Exact event location is only revealed after your booking is accepted.
privacy.gdprDesc: Your preference data is sensitive. We handle it with the highest care.

kinkTest.title: The Kink Test
kinkTest.subtitle: Discover your archetype
kinkTest.desc: A Yes/No/Maybe questionnaire inspired by the best community references. For each activity, you say yes if you want it, no if it's off-limits, or maybe if you're curious. The result: your lifestyle archetype plus compatibility tags.

events.title: Events & Swing Clubs
events.desc: Discover events near you. Reserve your spot. Exact location only appears after your booking is accepted — your privacy stays protected.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Verified sex shops sell their products directly to our community. Discreet, secure, behind the age gate.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. Messages are encrypted E2E — even we cannot read them. Your exact location is never shared without your permission.
faq.a2: Verification by selfie (mandatory), video (optional) and social networks (optional). Each level adds a badge to the profile.
faq.a3: Yes. Sexual preference data is sensitive under GDPR (Art. 9) and receives enhanced protection. You can export or delete your data at any time.
faq.a4: There is a fully functional free plan. VIP starts at €9.99/month for female singles. Swing club and sex shop accounts are always free.
